data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for priority levels, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of this functionality. The linked use case mentions priority levels as a need, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of how these levels are implemented or validated in the system. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities that validate priority levels (blocking vs non-blocking).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of priority levels.
